Action: Business Verifier creates a verification request with security requirements; Wallet retrieves signed request object from verifier
Data:
- Accepted issuer DID
- University credential requirements (withUniversity)
- JWT secure (jwtSecure)
- Verification request deeplink
Expected Result: Wallet successfully fetches the signed OID4VP request object as a compact JWS

Action: Wallet decodes and validates the signed JWT payload structure
Data:
- Signed JWT (header.payload.signature)
- JWT payload contains: client_id, client_id_scheme, response_uri, response_mode, nonce
Expected Result: All required fields are present; client_id_scheme is 'did'; response_uri contains correct endpoint path; nonce is non-empty
